# Martin Summit Media

> Adventure elopement videographers and photographers based in Western North Carolina, available worldwide.

## About Us

Martin Summit Media is a husband-and-wife team specializing in cinematic adventure elopement videography and photography. We capture intimate weddings and elopements in breathtaking outdoor locations including mountains, waterfalls, forests, and beaches.

## Services

- Adventure Elopement Videography: Cinematic films capturing your intimate ceremony in stunning natural settings
- Adventure Elopement Photography: Documentary-style photography for outdoor elopements
- Destination Wedding Videography: Full wedding day coverage for adventure-loving couples
- Mountain Elopement Packages: Combined photo and video packages for mountain ceremonies
- Waterfall Elopement Coverage: Specialized experience filming at waterfall locations

## Service Areas

Primary locations:
- Western North Carolina (Asheville, Blue Ridge Mountains, Blue Ridge Parkway)
- Pacific Northwest (Oregon, Washington, Mount Rainier, Columbia River Gorge)
- Available for destination elopements worldwide

## Pricing

Investment starts at $2,500 for elopement coverage. Full wedding packages available. Contact for custom quotes.

## Contact

- Website: https://martinsummitmedia.com
- Booking Inquiries: https://martinsummitmedia.com/inquire
- Email: info@martinsummitmedia.com
- Instagram: @martinsummitmedia
- YouTube: @martinsummitmedia
- TikTok: @martinsummitmedia

## Why Choose Us

1. We're adventurers ourselves: We understand the logistics of filming in remote locations
2. Husband and wife team: We work seamlessly together to capture every moment
3. Cinematic storytelling: Our films are crafted to be watched for generations
4. Planning assistance: We help with location scouting, permits, and timeline planning
5. Worldwide availability: Based in NC, but we travel anywhere love takes us

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you travel for elopements?
A: Yes! We're based in Western North Carolina but travel worldwide for adventure elopements.

Q: What's included in your packages?
A: Our packages include full-day coverage, professionally edited films, highlight reels, and raw footage options.

Q: How far in advance should I book?
A: We recommend booking 6-12 months in advance for popular dates and locations.

Q: Do you help with elopement planning?
A: Yes! We offer guidance on locations, permits, timelines, and vendor recommendations.
